name: Novellus Systems, Inc.
description: Novellus Systems, Inc. was a prominent American company that specialized in the development, manufacturing, sale, and service of advanced semiconductor equipment used in the fabrication of integrated circuits. Founded by Brad Mattson, the company provided critical deposition, surface preparation, and chemical mechanical planarization technologies to the global semiconductor industry. Novellus Systems was headquartered in San Jose, California, until it was acquired by Lam Research Corporation in 2012, effectively integrating its innovative manufacturing solutions into Lam Research's broader portfolio of semiconductor processing equipment and services for leading chipmakers worldwide.
